text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: We've got a gathering of only the fastest racers here at Tokyo Racecourse in Fuchu! Ladies and gentlemen, you are about to witness history in the making!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text: Lady Ardan...
...Allow me to see what you're made of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: There's something I'd like to say before the race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Having you as my trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Has truly made me happy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I ask that you watch closely, and witness the
instance in which all the moments we've shared
come together to shatter the preordained
outcome.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I shall do my best.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Everyone's in such tip-top form.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah, this is real dandy. Now we can get this show on the road!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...This is incredible.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But I won't be defeated.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Oguri, Creek, and Inari.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I extend my gratitude to you all... for living
alongside me in this moment, and for shining on
with your brilliant radiance.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Those vivid and dazzling days my precious rivals
gifted me...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Wonderful memories of the races in which we
surpassed our limits together...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I shall turn each and every one of these moments
into the shining light of my current self.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Let's begin...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Our autumn Tenno Sho!
